final:
module mux_2to1 (
    input A,
    input B,
    input Sel,
    output Y
);

assign Y = Sel ? B : A;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= ~Sel & A; // Misleading assignment to output
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Y <= ~Sel & A; // Misleading assignment to output
